design_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism with High-Energy Triggers. Deep Obsidian backgrounds focus the eye, Cyan Neon signals active states and core interactions, and Gold is reserved purely for high-value focal points like the Nexus Trigger, XP, and Medals. The interface must feel like premium, competitive athletic equipment—sharp, responsive, and intense.

interactions_and_animations.buttons: All interactive buttons MUST use `react-native-reanimated`. Wrap with `Pressable`, use `useSharedValue` and map `onPressIn` to scale down to 0.95 using `withSpring`, and `onPressOut` to return to scale 1.
interactions_and_animations.welcome_bonus: The 100 XP Welcome Bonus (Step 3) must feature a massive gold text fading in (`withTiming`) and scaling up (`withSpring`) on a pure black (#050505) screen.
interactions_and_animations.settings_drawer: The Hamburger menu triggers a settings drawer that slides in from the right edge. Use Reanimated `translateX` to animate the transition.
interactions_and_animations.dna_radar: Load the biometric radar chart with a staggered opacity and scale entrance animation to emphasize the high-tech, data-driven nature of the app.

Auth_Index.layout: Centered hero visual. Massive typography ('ARENADARE'). Two primary action buttons: 'START LEGACY' (Cyan Fill) and 'RESUME' (Cyan Outline).
Auth_Index.background: Use a dark textured image overlay with opacity 0.8 over #050505.

Auth_Forms.layout: Real-time validation text (Green/Red) directly under inputs. Include 'Mostra/Nascondi' (Show/Hide) toggle inside the password input. T&C checkbox.

Onboarding.step_1: Grid of three massive selection cards: 'Atleta', 'Coach', 'Palestra'. Active state triggers a Cyan Neon border.
Onboarding.step_2: Visual masonry or scrollable list for Sport selection. High-contrast images.
Onboarding.step_3: Black screen. Giant Gold '100 XP' text illuminates the center. Redirects to CORE tab.

Core_Tab.layout: Header with user Avatar (Left) and Hamburger Menu (Right). A horizontal XP Bar below the header. Feed of 'Battle Live' cards and Medals.

Crews_Tab.layout: Social feed layout for Crews. Apple-style swipe-to-action on the list items for 'Invites'.

DNA_Tab.layout: High-tech layout. A Biometric Radar Chart occupies the top 50%. A grid-based 'Talent Card' shows numeric stats below.

Nexus_Tab.layout: Discipline Library displaying video/image-based cards. 'Discipline Forge' visible only for Coach role.

testing_guidelines.test_ids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` attribute (the React Native equivalent of `data-testid`). Format: kebab-case, role-based. Example: `testID='login-submit-button'`.

hero_background.description: Artistic shot of a shirtless man with neon paint, ideal for the Auth Index background when darkened.

gym_performance.description: Man curling dumbbells, perfect for the 'Atleta' role card or sports category placeholders.

chalk_hands.description: Chalked hands lifting a barbell, great for background texture or sport selection.

sports_collage.description: Generic sports texture for placeholder cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo App. Do NOT use HTML, CSS, or Tailwind.
Use standard React Native `StyleSheet.create` for all styling logic.
Implement layout using React Native `View`, `Text`, `TextInput`, `Image`, and `Pressable`.

All physical buttons MUST be wrapped in a custom animated component using `react-native-reanimated`. Utilize `useSharedValue` and `withSpring` to scale the button down to 0.95 on `onPressIn` and back to 1 on `onPressOut`.
Build a custom Bottom Tab Navigator to support the protruding, floating Gold +NEXUS trigger button in the absolute center. Do not use the default tab bar appearance for the center icon.
Strictly follow the color palette constraints: #050505 Background, #00E5FF Cyan accents, and #FFD700 Gold accents.
Ensure the entire UI is built with Italian language text (e.g., 'Atleta', 'Palestra', 'Mostra/Nascondi').
Append `testID` string attributes to all buttons, inputs, tabs, and interactive elements to satisfy automated testing requirements.
